Subject: SRC Rule 17 and PSE disclosure readiness; HR/tax data handling for Q3 follow-on offering
Proposed transaction (MNPI): Board approved a PHP 2.4B follow-on offering on the PSE with target pricing window 12–16 June; no Form 17-C disclosure has been filed.
Draft term sheet includes unaudited EBITDA guidance for FY2026 and a standby purchase by Mabini Logistics Corp. (non-public); blackout list to be updated.
External sharing of draft MD&A, earnings bridge, and preliminary order book indications remains restricted; any leak would be material to a reasonable investor.
